description: Public, GitHub-safe contract spine and routing repository for the Horror.Place VM-constellation. Owns canonical JSON Schemas, routing spine, AI authoring contracts, and governance specs. Contains no raw horror content.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: Prohibits raw horror narrative content in this Tier 1 repository. Only schemas, contract cards, specs, and governance docs are allowed.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All JSON artifacts must include a schemaRef pointing to a canonical schema ID or path in this repo.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: AI-authored artifacts must declare objectKind, targetRepo, targetPath, schemaRef, and tier in associated envelopes.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: Routing and manifest tooling must treat routingSpineRef as the canonical router for objectKind/tier triples.

authoringHints.summary: Use this repo for schemas, routing spine, AI authoring contracts, and governance specs. Do not generate seeds, regions, or runtime Lua here.
aiBehavior: Always load this manifest and the routing spine before proposing any new schema or contract card.
Treat this repo as Tier 1 public: no raw horror text, no trauma narratives, no private vault IDs.
Prefer small, single-purpose files that conform to existing schema families.
When in doubt about targetPath for a new schema, propose it under schemas/tooling/ and let CI or maintainers refine.
